{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Makimoto Shrine'''|樟本神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
